title: Gmail tool not sending emails in workflow
symptom: The Gmail tool fails to send emails when used as an agent tool in the workflow.
applies_when: Email sending is part of the workflow
not_this_if: Gmail node is configured correctly and used as a standard node
root_cause: When the Gmail tool is added as an agent tool, it may not function as expected due to context issues. The node needs to be configured properly within the workflow to send emails successfully.
fix_steps: Remove the Gmail tool from the agent configuration
Add the Gmail tool as a standard node in the workflow
Configure the Gmail node with the necessary email details
Test the workflow to ensure emails are sent
agent_instruction: Reconfigure the Gmail tool as a standard node in your workflow.
